title: orchis militaris subsp. simia
intro: Orchis militaris subsp. simia is a subspecies of the Orchis militaris plant, commonly known as the 'monkey orchid', a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Orchis militaris subsp. simia include its potential to enhance immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots to create capsules, tablets, or teas, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
